creator: nrgmilk@gmail.com
text:
emerald and compiz-fusion and scim are finished illegally in several minutes when they start compiz-fusion.

starting command is
env LIBGL_ALWAYS_INDIRECT=1 daemon compiz --replace gconf

gconf setting 
/apps/compiz/plugins/decoration/allscreens/options/command
is emerald
